claim_limit: bounded graph RT sub-paths only: visibility any-hit plus BFS/triangle candidate generation; not shortest-path, graph database, distributed graph analytics, or whole-app graph-system acceleration
comparable_metric_scope: strict graph visibility-edge, native BFS graph-ray, and native triangle-count graph-ray row-digest results for the same copies semantics
notes: Local graph baseline; OptiX graph submode baselines remain cloud/OptiX-only.
